requirement_topic.en: EAS / EBS Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116 at 60 Hz), and 60 Hz / 127 V / 220 V Grid Settings
requirement_topic.zh: EAS / EBS并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116，60 Hz）及60 Hz / 127 V / 220 V电网参数
requirement_topic.zht: EAS / EBS併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116，60 Hz）及60 Hz / 127 V / 220 V電網參數

summary.en: Suriname's electricity grid operates at 60 Hz — the Americas standard — with nominal distribution voltages of approximately 127 V (single-phase line-to-neutral) and 220 V (single-phase line-to-line) in urban areas served by EBS (N.V. Energiebedrijven Suriname). Some areas and industrial connections may use 115/230 V configurations. The energy sector regulator is EAS (Energie Autoriteit Suriname). For grid-tied solar PV inverters, the key requirements are: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding — the standard test procedure for utility-interconnected PV inverters must be conducted at 60 Hz, not 50 Hz; Chinese type-test results at 50 Hz do not satisfy a 60 Hz grid; (2) IEC 61727 (Characteristics of the utility interface for photovoltaic systems) covers frequency and voltage limits for PV system interconnection — Suriname's 60 Hz nominal must be the reference; (3) firmware protection settings (under-frequency, over-frequency, under-voltage, over-voltage, reconnection delay) must be configured and validated for EBS's 60 Hz grid conditions; (4) EBS interconnection approval is required before grid-tied commissioning. Suriname's formal PV grid-connection technical code is still developing — installers and exporters should confirm current EAS/EBS interconnection requirements directly before equipment commitment.
summary.zh: 苏里南电网运行频率为60 Hz（美洲标准），EBS（苏里南能源公司）服务城区名义配电电压约为127 V（单相相对中性线）和220 V（单相线间）。部分地区和工业用户可能采用115/230 V配置。能源行业监管机构为EAS（苏里南能源监管局）。并网太阳能光伏逆变器的关键要求如下：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛——并网光伏逆变器的标准测试程序须在60 Hz下进行，而非50 Hz；中国50 Hz型式试验结果不满足60 Hz电网要求；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系统公用电网接口特性）涵盖光伏系统并网频率和电压限值，应以苏里南60 Hz额定值为参考；（3）固件保护整定（欠频、过频、欠压、过压、重连延迟）须针对EBS 60 Hz电网条件进行配置和验证；（4）并网调试前须取得EBS互联批准。苏里南正式光伏并网技术规范仍在发展中——安装方和出口商在设备确认前应直接向EAS/EBS确认当前互联要求。
summary.zht: 蘇里南電網運行頻率為60 Hz（美洲標準），EBS（蘇里南能源公司）服務城區名義配電電壓約為127 V（單相相對中性線）和220 V（單相線間）。部分地區和工業用戶可能採用115/230 V配置。能源行業監管機構為EAS（蘇里南能源監管局）。併網太陽能光伏逆變器的關鍵要求如下：（1）IEC 62116防孤島——併網光伏逆變器的標準測試程序須在60 Hz下進行，而非50 Hz；中國50 Hz型式試驗結果不滿足60 Hz電網要求；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系統公用電網介面特性）涵蓋光伏系統併網頻率和電壓限值，應以蘇里南60 Hz額定值為參考；（3）韌體保護整定（欠頻、過頻、欠壓、過壓、重連延遲）須針對EBS 60 Hz電網條件進行配置和驗證；（4）併網調試前須取得EBS互聯批准。蘇里南正式光伏併網技術規範仍在發展中——安裝方和出口商在設備確認前應直接向EAS/EBS確認當前互聯要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (60 Hz test configuration required for Suriname grid)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (frequency and voltage limits for PV interconnection)
EAS (Energie Autoriteit Suriname) — energy sector regulatory authority for Suriname
EBS (N.V. Energiebedrijven Suriname) — national utility, interconnection authority for grid-tied solar PV

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence for solar PV inverters commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System), NB/T 32004-2018 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters). All of these Chinese standards are based on China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid. Anti-islanding test results obtained for the Chinese grid at 50 Hz are not valid for Suriname's 60 Hz grid. The frequency difference is fundamental: inverter protection relay trip thresholds, reconnection timing, and anti-islanding detection algorithms validated at 50 Hz must be reconfigured and retested at 60 Hz. There is no recognition agreement between China's grid standards and Suriname EAS/EBS requirements.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）和GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）。上述中国标准均基于中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网。针对中国50 Hz电网获得的防孤岛测试结果不适用于苏里南60 Hz电网。频率差异是根本性的：针对50 Hz验证的逆变器保护继电器跳闸阈值、重连时序和防孤岛检测算法须重新配置并在60 Hz下重新测试。中国电网标准与苏里南EAS/EBS要求之间不存在认可协议。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏併網逆變器技術規範）和GB/T 37408-2021（光伏併網逆變器技術要求）。上述中國標準均基於中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網。針對中國50 Hz電網獲得的防孤島測試結果不適用於蘇里南60 Hz電網。頻率差異是根本性的：針對50 Hz驗證的逆變器保護繼電器跳閘閾值、重連時序和防孤島檢測算法須重新配置並在60 Hz下重新測試。中國電網標準與蘇里南EAS/EBS要求之間不存在認可協議。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System) — 50 Hz-based
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China grid: 220/380 V at 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — 50 Hz-based
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — 50 Hz-based

gap.en: Gap — frequency mismatch is the primary barrier: Chinese inverter certifications are based on 50 Hz; Suriname's EBS grid is 60 Hz. Exporters must: (a) supply an inverter model with a 60 Hz operating mode and confirm factory firmware supports 60 Hz grid parameters; (b) obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence specifically conducted at 60 Hz grid conditions — 50 Hz test results are not transferable; (c) configure and document firmware protection thresholds (frequency trip points, voltage trip points, reconnection delay) for EBS 60 Hz / 127-220 V conditions; (d) confirm EAS/EBS interconnection approval requirements directly, as a formal published technical code may not yet be in place; (e) Dutch-language labelling and documentation may be expected given Suriname's Dutch administrative language. Where inverter firmware is reconfigured from the 50 Hz factory default, re-parameterisation must be documented and, if material, retested under IEC 62116 at 60 Hz.
gap.zh: 差距——频率不匹配是主要障碍：中国逆变器认证基于50 Hz；苏里南EBS电网为60 Hz。出口商须：（a）提供具有60 Hz运行模式的逆变器型号，并确认出厂固件支持60 Hz电网参数；（b）取得专门在60 Hz电网条件下进行的IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据——50 Hz测试结果不可转用；（c）为EBS 60 Hz / 127-220 V条件配置并记录固件保护阈值（频率跳闸点、电压跳闸点、重连延迟）；（d）直接向EAS/EBS确认互联批准要求，因正式发布的技术规范可能尚未到位；（e）考虑到苏里南荷兰语行政语言，可能须提供荷兰语标识和文件。若逆变器固件从50 Hz出厂默认值重新配置，须记录重新参数化过程，如变更重要，应在60 Hz下依据IEC 62116重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距——頻率不匹配是主要障礙：中國逆變器認證基於50 Hz；蘇里南EBS電網為60 Hz。出口商須：（a）提供具有60 Hz運行模式的逆變器型號，並確認出廠韌體支持60 Hz電網參數；（b）取得專門在60 Hz電網條件下進行的IEC 62116防孤島測試證據——50 Hz測試結果不可轉用；（c）為EBS 60 Hz / 127-220 V條件配置並記錄韌體保護閾值（頻率跳閘點、電壓跳閘點、重連延遲）；（d）直接向EAS/EBS確認互聯批准要求，因正式發布的技術規範可能尚未到位；（e）考慮到蘇里南荷蘭語行政語言，可能須提供荷蘭語標識和文件。若逆變器韌體從50 Hz出廠預設值重新配置，須記錄重新參數化過程，如變更重要，應在60 Hz下依據IEC 62116重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: EBS interconnection approval is required for grid-tied solar PV installation; 60 Hz grid compliance is a technical prerequisite for safe operation on the Suriname grid — non-compliance creates protection coordination and islanding risk
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese 50 Hz grid-connection approvals are valid only for China's 50 Hz grid and have no standing in Suriname's 60 Hz EBS grid interconnection process

source.publisher: Energie Autoriteit Suriname (EAS) — Suriname Energy Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese solar PV inverter certifications based on 50 Hz grid conditions cannot be directly used for Suriname's 60 Hz EBS grid. The inverter must support 60 Hz operation; anti-islanding (IEC 62116) and grid-protection firmware must be configured and documented for 60 Hz / 127-220 V. Confirm current EAS/EBS grid-connection requirements directly with the authorities before equipment commitment, as Suriname's formal PV interconnection technical code may still be developing. Dutch-language documentation should be prepared given Suriname's administrative language.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 基于50 Hz电网条件的中国太阳能光伏逆变器认证不能直接用于苏里南60 Hz EBS电网。逆变器须支持60 Hz运行；防孤岛（IEC 62116）和电网保护固件须针对60 Hz / 127-220 V进行配置和记录。在设备确认前，请直接向EAS/EBS确认当前并网要求，因苏里南正式光伏互联技术规范可能仍在发展中。考虑到苏里南行政语言，应准备荷兰语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 基於50 Hz電網條件的中國太陽能光伏逆變器認證不能直接用於蘇里南60 Hz EBS電網。逆變器須支持60 Hz運行；防孤島（IEC 62116）和電網保護韌體須針對60 Hz / 127-220 V進行配置和記錄。在設備確認前，請直接向EAS/EBS確認當前併網要求，因蘇里南正式光伏互聯技術規範可能仍在發展中。考慮到蘇里南行政語言，應準備荷蘭語文件。

requirement_topic.en: SSB Conformity Assessment and IEC Standards Adoption — Market-Access Gate for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: SSB合格评定和IEC标准采纳——光伏逆变器市场准入门槛
requirement_topic.zht: SSB合格評定和IEC標準採納——光伏逆變器市場准入門檻

summary.en: The Surinaams Standaarden Bureau (SSB — Suriname Standards Bureau) is the national standards body responsible for adopting and publishing national standards in Suriname. SSB adopts IEC international standards as national standards for electrical and electronic equipment including power conversion equipment. For solar PV inverters, SSB conformity — based on IEC standards such as IEC 62109-1/-2 (safety), IEC 62116 (anti-islanding), and IEC 62920 (EMC) — is the relevant technical conformity framework. Suriname does not currently operate a mandatory pre-shipment conformity certification scheme comparable to some other markets; however, EAS and project owners increasingly require IEC-based type-test evidence, and EBS may impose interconnection technical requirements. Importers should confirm with SSB and EAS whether a specific conformity declaration or certificate is required for the current import of solar PV inverters.
summary.zh: 苏里南标准局（SSB）是负责在苏里南采纳和发布国家标准的国家标准机构。SSB将IEC国际标准采纳为电气电子设备（包括功率变换设备）的国家标准。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，基于IEC 62109-1/-2（安全）、IEC 62116（防孤岛）和IEC 62920（EMC）等IEC标准的SSB合格评定是相关的技术合格框架。苏里南目前未实施类似其他市场的强制性装运前合格认证制度；但EAS和项目业主日益要求提供基于IEC的型式试验证据，EBS可能对互联提出技术要求。进口商应向SSB和EAS确认当前进口太阳能光伏逆变器是否需要特定的合格声明或证书。
summary.zht: 蘇里南標準局（SSB）是負責在蘇里南採納和發布國家標準的國家標準機構。SSB將IEC國際標準採納為電氣電子設備（包括功率轉換設備）的國家標準。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，基於IEC 62109-1/-2（安全）、IEC 62116（防孤島）和IEC 62920（EMC）等IEC標準的SSB合格評定是相關的技術合格框架。蘇里南目前未實施類似其他市場的強制性裝運前合格認證制度；但EAS和項目業主日益要求提供基於IEC的型式試驗證據，EBS可能對互聯提出技術要求。進口商應向SSB和EAS確認當前進口太陽能光伏逆變器是否需要特定的合格聲明或證書。

standards_or_laws: SSB (Surinaams Standaarden Bureau) — national standards body, IEC standards adoption
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface

summary.en: China does not have a bilateral recognition agreement with SSB for PV inverter conformity. Chinese CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CGC (China General Certification Centre) voluntary certificates based on GB/T 37408 are not recognised by SSB as equivalent to IEC-based conformity evidence. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Suriname should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited third-party laboratory — not Chinese domestic test reports — to satisfy IEC-based conformity requirements referenced by SSB, EAS, and EBS. CARICOM trade relationships may influence future mutual recognition frameworks, but no current recognition exists.
summary.zh: 中国与SSB之间就光伏逆变器合格评定不存在双边认可协议。基于GB/T 37408的中国CQC（中国质量认证中心）或CGC（中国质量认证中心）自愿性证书不被SSB认可为IEC合格评定证据的等效依据。出口至苏里南的中国制造商应从ILAC认可的第三方实验室取得IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书——而非中国国内测试报告——以满足SSB、EAS和EBS引用的基于IEC的合格评定要求。CARICOM贸易关系可能影响未来的互认框架，但目前尚无现行认可协议。
summary.zht: 中國與SSB之間就光伏逆變器合格評定不存在雙邊認可協議。基於GB/T 37408的中國CQC（中國質量認證中心）或CGC（中國質量認證中心）自願性證書不被SSB認可為IEC合格評定證據的等效依據。出口至蘇里南的中國製造商應從ILAC認可的第三方實驗室取得IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書——而非中國國內測試報告——以滿足SSB、EAS和EBS引用的基於IEC的合格評定要求。CARICOM貿易關係可能影響未來的互認框架，但目前尚無現行認可協議。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — not recognised by SSB as IEC equivalent
CQC/CGC voluntary certification — China domestic scheme, not recognised in Suriname

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T conformity documents and domestic voluntary certifications are not accepted as SSB/IEC conformity evidence in Suriname. Exporters must: (a) obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) confirm with SSB and EAS whether a formal conformity declaration or import notification is currently required; (c) ensure IEC test reports cover the 60 Hz operating configuration relevant to Suriname's grid, not only the 50 Hz configuration tested for the Chinese market. Suriname's regulatory framework for electrical products and PV equipment is still maturing — direct pre-shipment confirmation with SSB and EAS is essential.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T合格文件和国内自愿性认证不被苏里南接受为SSB/IEC合格评定证据。出口商须：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据；（b）向SSB和EAS确认目前是否须提供正式合格声明或进口通知；（c）确保IEC测试报告涵盖与苏里南电网相关的60 Hz运行配置，而非仅涵盖为中国市场测试的50 Hz配置。苏里南电气产品和光伏设备监管框架仍在完善中——出货前直接向SSB和EAS确认至关重要。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T合格文件和國內自願性認證不被蘇里南接受為SSB/IEC合格評定證據。出口商須：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據；（b）向SSB和EAS確認目前是否須提供正式合格聲明或進口通知；（c）確保IEC測試報告涵蓋與蘇里南電網相關的60 Hz運行配置，而非僅涵蓋為中國市場測試的50 Hz配置。蘇里南電氣產品和光伏設備監管框架仍在完善中——出貨前直接向SSB和EAS確認至關重要。

mandatory_status.target: SSB/IEC-based conformity evidence is the expected technical standard for electrical equipment in Suriname; formal mandatory pre-shipment certification requirements for PV inverters should be confirmed directly with SSB and EAS as the regulatory framework is still developing
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T conformity documents and CQC/CGC voluntary certificates are not recognised by SSB and do not confer market access in Suriname

source.publisher: Surinaams Standaarden Bureau (SSB) — Suriname Standards Bureau

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T conformity documents are not accepted as SSB/IEC equivalents in Suriname. Obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory — covering the 60 Hz operating configuration — before shipment. Confirm current SSB and EAS import conformity requirements directly before committing to shipment, as Suriname's regulatory framework for PV equipment is still developing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T合格文件不被苏里南接受为SSB/IEC等效依据。出货前须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖60 Hz运行配置的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。在确认出货前，请直接向SSB和EAS确认当前进口合格要求，因苏里南光伏设备监管框架仍在发展中。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T合格文件不被蘇里南接受為SSB/IEC等效依據。出貨前須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋60 Hz運行配置的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。在確認出貨前，請直接向SSB和EAS確認當前進口合格要求，因蘇里南光伏設備監管框架仍在發展中。
